Lars.name: Lars
Lars.description:
<c=cd6a00>Lars</c>
¡<c=boldPink>Am I adorable or am I super adorable?</c>

Solstice.name: Solstice
Solstice.description: Your ship's Xenobiologist. Their cards focus on applying <c=boldPink>status effects</c> to both your ship and the enemy's ship, as well as <c=boldPink>creating midrow objects</c>.

testArtifact.name: Overheat
testArtifact.description: At the end of their turn, enemy takes 1 hull damage for each 3 <c=status>HEAT</c> and keeps the unused heat.

Moisturizer.name: Moisturizer
Moisturizer.description: Reduces aqua ring requirement to heal by one

Rapier.name: Rapier
Rapier.description: No one knows how he was allowed to bring this on deck.

HeatExp.name: Heat Expansion
HeatExp.description: Doubles the amount of heat on the enemy.

WaterAbsorb.name: Water Absorb
WaterAbsorb.description_a: Absorbs the enemy's aqua ring and adds 3
WaterAbsorb.description_b: Absorbs double of the enemy's aqua ring

ScaleShot.name: Scale Shot
ScaleShot.description_a: Shoot to the left and right for 0 Damage, apply boost on hit.

BoostBall.name: Boost Ball
BoostBall.description: Gives 2 Boost to whoever destroys it, increasing whatever Status they gain next by 2.

AutododgeLeftNextTurn.name: Autododge Left Next Turn
AutododgeLeftNextTurn.description: At the start of next turn, gain <c=boldPink>{0}</c> <c=status>AUTODODGE LEFT</c>.

AquaRing.name: Aqua Ring
AquaRing.description: Used to power up certain cards. Can also be used with absorb to heal. Max 7

RainDance.name: Rain Dance
RainDance.description: Gain 1 Aqua Ring at the start of the turn

MaxAquaRing.name: Max Aqua Ring
MaxAquaRing.description: Increases limit of aqua ring by 1
